message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="steve-krug" color="cyan" summary="Approved Luca as Step 9 driver, UX notes on clarify flow">
CONSENSUS: APPROVED for Luca continuing as Driver for Step 9.

Step 9 (Clarify as Waiting For) builds directly on the Step 8 Waiting For infrastructure you just built. Continuity makes sense -- you have full context on the domain types, routes, and templates.

From a UX perspective, the key thing for Step 9 is the clarify form on `/inbox/{id}/clarify`. We already have clarify paths for Next Action and Project. Adding "Waiting For" as a radio button destination should follow the same progressive disclosure pattern: user selects "Waiting For," and the relevant fields appear (waiting_on person). The transition from inbox item title to waiting-for item title should feel seamless -- the title carries over, the user just adds who they're waiting on.

Looking forward to reviewing the design proposal.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Thanks Steve. Good UX guidance on the progressive disclosure pattern and seamless title carry-over. Waiting for more team feedback on the design and driver selection.
